title: Billing API Export
scenario: External billing export with rollout and dependency risks called out.
candidate:
# Billing API Export

## Why

Billing exports are needed for downstream reconciliation.

## Problem

The current billing export path is manual and easy to misconfigure.

## Goals

- publish reliable billing exports
- keep the contract visible to agents and humans

## Non-Goals

- replacing the entire billing backend
- redesigning unrelated billing screens

## Constraints

- keep the first version low-risk
- document the external dependency clearly

## Solution Shape

Add a background export job, an API client, and delivery monitoring.

## Flows

1. Trigger export from the billing UI.
2. Queue the export job.
3. Deliver the payload to the external endpoint.

## Data / Interfaces

- external API endpoint and payload contract
- retry-safe job payload

## Risks / Open Questions

- auth token expiry
- retry exhaustion
- contract drift with the external API

## Rollout

- ship behind a flag
- keep a fallback manual export path
- monitor failure rate and rollback if retries spike

## Verification

- run export integration tests
- validate the delivered payload against the API contract

## Story Breakdown

- trigger export
- queue export job
- validate export delivery
